allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\AI_Working_place\\tool_manga_downloader"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \($p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "EXITED with code: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Host "Running, PID: $\($p.Id\)" })

PowerShell(cd "D:\\AI_Working_place\\tool_manga_downloader"; $env:PYTHONPATH = "D:\\AI_Working_place\\tool_manga_downloader"; $p = Start-Process ".\\venv\\Scripts\\pythonw.exe" "main.py" -PassThru -Wait -RedirectStandardError "err_gui.txt" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Exit code: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content "err_gui.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
